task_description: Build a Health & Hydration Reminder MVP - a full-stack Next.js app with medication checklist (daily reset), water tracker with progress bar, and email reminder infrastructure. Uses 2-table SQLite schema, Next.js API routes as backend, Server Actions for mutations, and responsive Tailwind CSS with semantic HTML.

verification.summary: npm run build succeeds with all routes compiled (8 routes). npm run lint passes cleanly. Three review passes completed - all issues resolved, final verdict APPROVED.
